subject: docs(pwa): standardize install/update UI patterns from cross-repo audit
body:
Audited canva-grid, four-ems, sync-tone, and glow-props PWA implementations.
Rewrote PWA_SYSTEM.md to standardize on canva-grid's patterns: ref-based
interval cleanup for usePWAUpdate, data-driven getInstallInstructions() with
four-ems' iOS/macOS split, context-based Toast system replacing one-off banners,
focus-trapped InstallInstructionsModal with benefits section.

Tags: pwa, documentation, standardization, cross-repo
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: minor
